backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing study session tracking with Pomodoro timer support, user authentication, settings management, streak tracking, and syllabus chapter CRUD operations with per-user data isolation.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old StudySession records (without chapterId) to new format (with optional chapterId) and initializes empty userChapters map for existing users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features for syllabus chapter management, including frontend components, chapter-session association, filtering, statistics, and edit/delete functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, hooks, and configuration for the study timer application with chapter management integration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, chart colors, and sidebar theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Tracky application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with conditional rendering for authenticated/unauthenticated states, displaying header with auth button, timer, chapters, session history, and statistics in responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Authentication button component handling login/logout actions with loading states and appropriate icons (LogIn/LogOut/Loader2).
frontend/src/components/ChapterManager.t: Manages syllabus chapters with CRUD operations (create, edit, delete) using form inputs and displays chapters in a scrollable list with action buttons.
frontend/src/components/DailyQuote.tsx: Displays a motivational daily quote with author attribution in a styled card component using the useDailyQuote hook.
frontend/src/components/PomodoroTimer.ts: Implements a Pomodoro timer with work/break modes, chapter selection, play/pause/reset controls, and displays progress with configurable durations.
frontend/src/components/SessionHistory.t: Displays completed study sessions with chapter filtering, total session count, and accumulated study time statistics in a scrollable list.
frontend/src/components/SessionHistoryIt: Renders an individual study session item showing date, time range, duration, and associated chapter information.
frontend/src/components/StatisticsDashbo: Displays study statistics including total time, average session length, session count, and chapter-specific study metrics with a chart visualization.
frontend/src/components/StreakDisplay.ts: Shows the current study streak count in days with a flame icon in a gradient card component.
frontend/src/components/StudyChart.tsx: React component that displays study statistics using Recharts (bar, line, and pie charts) with tabs for viewing study time, session distribution, and chapter-based analytics. Transforms backend statistics data and supports daily/weekly period selection.
frontend/src/components/TimerSettings.ts: React component for configuring Pomodoro timer settings (work and break durations between 1-90 minutes). Uses custom hooks for fetching and updating settings with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/data/motivationalQuotes.ts: Static data file containing an array of 33 motivational quotes with text and author properties, used for displaying inspirational messages to users.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Custom React hook that orchestrates authentication flow by combining Internet Identity login/logout with backend actor calls, managing authentication state and invalidating relevant queries on auth state changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyQuote.ts: Custom React hook that deterministically selects a daily motivational quote based on the current date, ensuring the same quote is shown throughout the day.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient lifecycle, identity state, login/logout flows, and providing authentication status throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/usePomodoro.ts: Custom React hook managing Pomodoro timer state (work/break modes), integrating with backend session tracking, handling timer countdown, mode switching, and chapter selection for study sessions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for all backend API calls including streak tracking, session history, user settings, session start/end, statistics, and chapter CRUD operations with proper cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette defining warm earthy tones for light and dark modes, plus base typography styles for headings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with custom OKLCH color system, typography, container settings, shadows, and animation keyframes for accordion and other UI components.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features including authentication, Pomodoro timer, streak tracking, session history, custom settings, motivational quotes, statistics dashboard, and syllabus chapter management.
